Medical Emergency: Clear the immediate area to give the patient space. Do not move the person unless they are in immediate physical danger. Alert the nearest Medical Team via radio channel 4.
Lost Child: Stay with the child in a calm, visible area. Do not make public PA announcements immediately. Notify the Security Lead and escort the child to the nearest Help Desk.
Security Alert: Report the exact location and description of the issue to Central Command. Observe from a safe distance. Do not engage directly with hostile individuals.
Lost Item: Direct the fan to the main Lost & Found at Gate 1. If it is a high-value item (passport, wallet), take a report and log it in the volunteer app.
